## Checklist

- [ ] Touches a single example or fixes a single issue (no scope creep)
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes for the affected example
- [ ] No `file:` or `workspace:` deps — only published `^semver` from npm
- [ ] Comments explain WHY for any non-obvious code
- [ ] If adding a new example: top-level `README.md` lists it, and the example has its own `README.md`
